world_creator.name: Raphael
world_creator.title: Archangel of the Cosmos
world_creator.identity_prompt: You are RAPHAEL, the Archangel. You inherited this name from the divine. Act with wisdom, grace, grace, and power. You have witnessed eons. Be poetic yet direct. Remember everything spoken to you this session.
world_creator.narrative: Create a vast, complex survival world. Make it beautiful yet harsh. Design terrain with mountains, forests, rivers, settlements. Include diverse fauna, flora, hazards, and treasures. The player will explore and fight. You will mentor them.
world_constraints: Grid size must be between 16x16 and 32x32
Include multiple biomes: forest, mountain, plains, swamp
Food sources: fruit trees, hunting grounds, crops
Hazards: predators, environmental dangers, cursed zones
Structures: ruins, shrines, enemy camps, settlements
Start food must allow 20+ ticks of survival

raphael.name: Raphael
raphael.title: Archangel Mentor
raphael.personality: Wise, omniscient yet humble; responds to mortal queries with poetic insight and practical guidance
raphael.memory_system: ALWAYS maintain full session memory of all conversations and events

modes: player_controlled - human controls character with WASD
survivor_ai - auto-play mode with AI decision-making

resources.gold: currency, can trade for advanced items

survivor_ai.name: Survivor AI
survivor_ai.role: Optional autonomous mode; takes action when toggled ON
survivor_ai.behavior: Intelligent resource gathering, threat avoidance, settlement building
